title: justicia chrysocoma
intro: Justicia chrysocoma, also known as the golden fortunella plant, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Justicia chrysocoma include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
